title: 如何how will the ccp attack the taiwan?
meta_description: 如何how will the ccp attack the taiwan? - it is easy to know,  if the CCP’s military attacks Taiwan, it cannot fully prepare in advance.  Because it knows that it cannot ...
contents: it is easy to know,  if the CCP’s military attacks Taiwan, it cannot fully prepare in advance.  Because it knows that it cannot be kept secret.  So first secretly prepare the down a part of army as price of first step.  But it has well-developed government high-speed railways and roads, and it should be prepared at any time during the war.  The life of the Chinese people is a tool of the CCP.  The CCP is good at selling high-priced houses.  The CCP’s Taiwan-fighting model is also at first paying one million troops as price. and then paying more and more soldier and boats like payinginterest one after another.  when dead soldier getting more and more their's familys would protest with ampty Paper, the government suppressed with hooligans.  Pink lost her delicate lifestyle. ccp oughtto be blocked by the international community, and returned to the results of the Korean War.
